final:
module mux4to1 (
    input wire [3:0] in, // 4 input signals
    input wire [1:0] sel, // 2 selection lines
    output wire out // output signal
);
    assign out =  (sel == 2'b00) ? in[0] :
                 (sel == 2'b01) ? in[1] :
                 (sel == 2'b10) ? in[2] :
                 (sel == 2'b11) ? in[3] : (1'b1 & 1'b0); // default case
endmodule

module mux4to1 (
    input wire [3:0] I,  // 4-bit input
    input wire [1:0] S,  // 2-bit select
    output wire Y        // output
);
    assign Y =  (S == 2'b00) ? I[0] :
               (S == 2'b01) ? I[1] :
               (S == 2'b10) ? I[2] :
               (S == 2'b11) ? I[3] : (1'b1 & 1'b0); // Default case (though should never happen)
endmodule

module mux5to1 (  
    input wire [4:0] in, // 5 input signals  
    input wire [2:0] sel, // 3-bit select line  
    output wire out // Output signal  
);  
    assign out =  (sel == 3'b000) ? in[0] :  
                 (sel == 3'b001) ? in[1] :  
                 (sel == 3'b010) ? in[2] :  
                 (sel == 3'b011) ? in[3] :  
                 (sel == 3'b100) ? in[4] : (1'b1 & 1'b0);  
endmodule

module audio_mixer (
    input [15:0] A,  // 16-bit audio signal A
    input [15:0] B,  // 16-bit audio signal B
    input S,         // Select signal
    output [15:0] Y  // Output audio signal
);
    assign Y =  (S == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? A : B; // Select A or B based on S
endmodule

module power_gating (
    input wire PC, // Power control signal
    input wire D,  // Data input
    output wire Y  // Output
);
assign Y =  PC ? D : (1'b1 & 1'b0); // If PC is high, output D, otherwise output 0
endmodule

module mux4to1 (
    input wire I0,
    input wire I1,
    input wire I2,
    input wire I3,
    input wire [1:0] S,
    output wire Y
);
    assign Y =  (S == 2'b00) ? I0 :
               (S == 2'b01) ? I1 :
               (S == 2'b10) ? I2 :
               (S == 2'b11) ? I3 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);
endmodule

module mux4to1 (
    input wire A,
    input wire B,
    input wire C,
    input wire D,
    input wire [1:0] S,
    output wire Y
);
    assign Y =  (S == 2'b00) ? A :
               (S == 2'b01) ? B :
               (S == 2'b10) ? C :
               (S == 2'b11) ? D : (1'b1 & 1'b0); // default case
endmodule

module power_gating(
    input wire control,
    input wire in,
    output wire out
);
    assign out =  control ? in : (1'b1 & 1'b0); // Power gating logic
endmodule

module mux4to1 (
    input wire A,
    input wire B,
    input wire C,
    input wire D,
    input wire [1:0] S,
    output wire Y
);
    assign Y =  (S == 2'b00) ? A :
               (S == 2'b01) ? B :
               (S == 2'b10) ? C :
               (S == 2'b11) ? D : (1'b1 & 1'b0); // Default case to avoid latches
endmodule

module clock_gating(
    input clk,        // Clock input
    input enable,     // Enable signal
    output gated_clk  // Gated clock output
);
    assign gated_clk =  enable ? clk : (1'b1 & 1'b0); // If enable is high, output clk, else output 0
endmodule

module top_module(
  input CLK,
  input EN,
  input TE,
  output ENCLK
);assign ENCLK =  (EN & TE) ? CLK : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input  A1,
    input  A2,
    input  B1,
    input  C1,
    input  D1,
    output Y
);assign Y =  ((A1 & A2) | (B1 & C1)) ? 1'b1 : (D1 ? (1'b1 & 1'b0) : 1'b1);

endmodule

module mux_4to1(
    input       a,
    input       b,
    input       c,
    input       d,
    input [1:0] sel,
    output      y
);

assign y =  (sel == 2'b00) ? a :
           (sel == 2'b01) ? b :
           (sel == 2'b10) ? c :
           (sel == 2'b11) ? d : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input S,
    output Y
);assign Y =  (S == (1'b1 | 1'b0)) ? B : A;

endmodule

module top_module( input[1:0] alu_op, 
       input [3:0] funct,
       output JRControl
    );assign JRControl =  ({alu_op,funct}==6'b001000) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);endmodule

module top_module(output out);assign out =  (1'b1 & 1'b0); 
 endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C1,
    output Y
);assign Y =  (C1 == 1'b1) ? (A & B) : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input address,
    input [7:0] in0,
    input [7:0] in1,
    output [7:0] out
    );assign out =  (address == (1'b1 | 1'b0)) ? in1 : in0;

endmodule

module barrel_shifter (
	input [7:0] data,
	input [2:0] shift,
	output [7:0] out
);assign out =  (shift == 3'b000) ? data :
			(shift == 3'b001) ? {data[6:0], (1'b1 & 1'b0)} :
			(shift == 3'b010) ? {data[5:0], 2'b00} :
			(shift == 3'b011) ? {data[4:0], 3'b000} :
			(shift == 3'b100) ? {data[3:0], 4'b0000} :
			(shift == 3'b101) ? {data[2:0], 5'b00000} :
			(shift == 3'b110) ? {data[1:0], 6'b000000} :
			{data[0], 7'b0000000};

endmodule

module top_module(Q);output Q;

	
	specify
	endspecify
	

assign Q =  (1'b1 | 1'b0);endmodule

module top_module(input wire [2:0] CPLLREFCLKSEL,input wire GTREFCLK0,input wire GTREFCLK1,input wire GTNORTHREFCLK0,input wire GTNORTHREFCLK1,input wire GTSOUTHREFCLK0,input wire GTSOUTHREFCLK1,input wire GTGREFCLK,output wire CPLL_MUX_CLK_OUT);assign CPLL_MUX_CLK_OUT =  CPLLREFCLKSEL == 3'b000 ? (1'b1 & 1'b0) 
  : CPLLREFCLKSEL == 3'b001 ? GTREFCLK0 
  : CPLLREFCLKSEL == 3'b010 ? GTREFCLK1 
  : CPLLREFCLKSEL == 3'b011 ? GTNORTHREFCLK0 
  : CPLLREFCLKSEL == 3'b100 ? GTNORTHREFCLK1 
  : CPLLREFCLKSEL == 3'b101 ? GTSOUTHREFCLK0 
  : CPLLREFCLKSEL == 3'b110 ? GTSOUTHREFCLK1 
  : GTGREFCLK; 
 endmodule

module top_module(output q);assign q =  (1'b1 | 1'b0); 
 endmodule

module top_module(
  input A,
  input B,
  input S,
  output MO
);assign MO =  (S == (1'b1 | 1'b0)) ? B : A;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input signed [2:0] A,
	input signed [2:0] B,
	input carry_in,
	output signed [3:0] Sum  
	);assign Sum =  A + B + $signed({(1'b1 & 1'b0), carry_in});
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [1:0] I0,
    input [1:0] I1,
    output [1:0] O,
    input CIN
);assign O =  2'((2'(({(1'b1 & 1'b0),CIN}) + I0)) + I1);
endmodule

module top_module(input[13:0] a, output[1:0] s);assign s =  (a==14'b0)? 2'b00 : { a[13],(1'b1 | 1'b0) };
endmodule

module top_module(output q);assign q =  (1'b1 & 1'b0); 
 endmodule

module top_module(output G);assign G =  (1'b1 & 1'b0);
endmodule

module top_module(input [31:0] ina, inb,
              input sel,
              output [31:0] out);assign out= (sel==(1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? ina : inb;

endmodule

module top_module(Q);output Q;

	
	specify
	endspecify
	

assign Q =  (1'b1 & 1'b0);endmodule

module top_module(
  input data_in,
  input key_in,
  input mode,
  output data_out
);assign data_out =  (mode == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? (data_in ^ key_in) : (data_in ^ ~key_in);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input  a,
    input  b,
    input  sel,
    output out
);assign out =  (sel == (1'b1 | 1'b0)) ? b : a;

endmodule

module top_module(output  LED_R);assign LED_R =  (1'b1 | 1'b0);
endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input A3,
    input B1,
    input B2,
    output X
);assign X =  (A1 & A2 & A3) ? 1'b1 : ((B1 & B2) ? (1'b1 & 1'b0) : 1'b1);

endmodule

module top_module(input [47:0]a, output [47:0]b);assign b= a + (1'b1 | 1'b0);
endmodule

module top_module(
  input [(1 - 1):0] ip,
  output [(1 - 1):0] op,
  input clk,
  input ce,
  input clr);reg [(1 - 1):0] op_reg;

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (ce) begin
      op_reg <= ~ip;
    end
  end

  assign op =  clr ? (1'b1 & 1'b0) : op_reg;

endmodule

module mux4to1
(
  input [1:0] sel,
  input in0,
  input in1,
  input in2,
  input in3,
  output out
);

assign out =  (sel == 2'b00) ? in0 :
             (sel == 2'b01) ? in1 :
             (sel == 2'b10) ? in2 :
             (sel == 2'b11) ? in3 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [7:0] input_a,
    input [7:0] input_b,
    output [7:0] sum_out,
    output overflow
);wire [8:0] sum_tmp;
    assign sum_tmp =  {(1'b1 & 1'b0), input_a} + {1'b0, input_b}; // add inputs with carry-in of 0

    assign sum_out = sum_tmp[7:0]; // output lower 8 bits of sum
    assign overflow = sum_tmp[8]; // output overflow bit

endmodule

module top_module(
    output X,
    input  A0,
    input  A1,
    input  A2,
    input  A3,
    input  S0,
    input  S1
);assign X =  (S1 == 0 && S0 == 0) ? A0 :
               (S1 == 0 && S0 == 1) ? A1 :
               (S1 == 1 && S0 == 0) ? A2 :
               (S1 == 1 && S0 == 1) ? A3 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(output Z);assign Z =  (1'b1 | 1'b0); 
 endmodule

module mux8bit2to1 (
	input sel,
	input [7:0] d0,
	input [7:0] d1,
	output [7:0] y
);assign y =  (sel == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? d0 : d1;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input in1,
    input in2,
    input in3,
    input in4,
    output out
);assign out =  (in1 || in2 || in3) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input A3,
    input B1,
    input C1,
    output X
);assign X =  (A1 | (A2 & !A1) | (A3 & !A2 & !A1)) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(output V);assign V =  (1'b1 | 1'b0);
endmodule

module mux2to1 (
	input sel,
	input a, b,
	output y);assign y =  (sel == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? a :
	           (sel == 1'b1) ? b : 1'b0;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input c,
    input d,
    output y
);assign y =  ((a) | (b & (c | d))) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
	input [3:0] a,
	input [3:0] b,
	output greater);assign greater =  (a > b) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);
endmodule

module mux_4to1(
    input in0,          // 1-bit input 0.
    input in1,          // 1-bit input 1.
    input in2,          // 1-bit input 2.
    input in3,          // 1-bit input 3.
    input [1:0] sel,    // 2-bit select signal.

    output out          // 1-bit output.
);

assign out =  (sel == 2'b00) ? in0 :
             (sel == 2'b01) ? in1 :
             (sel == 2'b10) ? in2 :
             (sel == 2'b11) ? in3 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(input signed [2:0] a,input [2:0] b,output signed [5:0] prod);assign prod =  a*$signed({(1'b1 & 1'b0), b}); 
 endmodule

module top_module(input wire TXPLLREFCLK_DIV1,input wire TXPLLREFCLK_DIV2,input wire TXOUTCLKPMA,input wire TXOUTCLKPCS,input wire [2:0] TXOUTCLKSEL,input wire TXDLYBYPASS,output wire TXOUTCLK);assign TXOUTCLK =  TXOUTCLKSEL == 3'b001 ? TXOUTCLKPCS 
  : TXOUTCLKSEL == 3'b010 ? TXOUTCLKPMA 
  : TXOUTCLKSEL == 3'b011 ? TXPLLREFCLK_DIV1 
  : TXOUTCLKSEL == 3'b100 ? TXPLLREFCLK_DIV2 
  : (1'b1 | 1'b0); 
 endmodule

module top_module(
  input [3:0] data_in,
  input [1:0] shift_amt,
  output [3:0] data_out
);assign data_out =  (shift_amt == 2'b00) ? data_in :
                    (shift_amt == 2'b01) ? {data_in[2:0], (1'b1 & 1'b0)} :
                    (shift_amt == 2'b10) ? {data_in[1:0], 2'b00} :
                                          {data_in[0], 3'b000};
                                          
endmodule

module top_module(
    input wire [31:0] x,
    input wire [31:0] y,
    output wire z
);assign z =  x == y ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input load,
    input [0:0] D,
    output [0:0] Q
);wire [0:0] Q_next;
    reg [0:0] Q_reg; // Change from wire to reg

    assign Q = Q_reg;

    assign Q_next[0] =  (load == (1'b1 | 1'b0)) ? D : (Q_reg[0] + D[0]); // Modified to use D directly for addition

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q_reg <= 1'b0; // Reset condition
        end else begin
            Q_reg <= Q_next; // Update Q_reg with Q_next
        end
    end
    
endmodule

module top_module(output GSR);assign GSR =  (1'b1 | 1'b0); 
 endmodule

module top_module(
    input [31:0] ex_rdata_a,
    input [31:0] ex_rdata_b,
    input [31:0] mem_wb_dout,
    input control_rdata_a,
    input control_rdata_b,
    output wire [31:0] rdata_a,
    output wire [31:0] rdata_b
);assign rdata_a =  (control_rdata_a == (1'b1 | 1'b0))?mem_wb_dout:ex_rdata_a;
assign rdata_b = (control_rdata_b == 1'b1)?mem_wb_dout:ex_rdata_b;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input clk_in,
  input enable,
  output clk_out
  );// Use a generic clock buffer instead of BUFGCTRL as it may be not defined in your environment
  assign clk_out =  (enable) ? clk_in : (1'b1 & 1'b0); // Assuming you want to output clk_in when enabled, else 0

endmodule

module alu (
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    input sel, // 0 for addition, 1 for subtraction
    output [3:0] result,
    output carry_out);
assign {carry_out, result} =  (sel == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? (a + b) : (a - b);
endmodule

module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  A3  ,
    input  B1  ,
    input  C1  ,
    output Y   ,

    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);assign Y =  (A1 || (A2 && !A1) || (A3 && !A2 && !A1)) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);
endmodule

module top_module(input [41:0] xxx,input [1:0] yyy,output [41:0] zzz);assign zzz =  xxx+ { {40{(1'b1 & 1'b0)}},yyy }; 
 endmodule

module top_module(input VPWR, input VGND, output decap);assign decap =  (VPWR == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) && (VGND == 1'b1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1_N,
    output Y,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND
);assign Y =  (A1 && A2) ? 1'b1 :
               (A1 && !A2) ? (1'b1 & 1'b0) :
               (!A1 && A2) ? 1'b0 :
               (!A1 && !A2 && !B1_N) ? 1'b1 :
               (!A1 && !A2 && B1_N) ? 1'b0 :
               1'b0;

endmodule

module mux_2to1(
    input a,    // Input signal a.
    input b,    // Input signal b.
    input sel,  // 1-bit Selection signal.
    output y    // Output signal.
);

assign y =  (sel == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? a : b;  // Multiplexer operation.

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input C1,
    input D1,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output X
);assign X =  (A1 == 0 && A2 == 0 && B1 == 0 && C1 == 0 && D1 == 0 && VGND == 0 && VNB == 0 && VPB == 0 && VPWR == 0) ? (1'b1 & 1'b0) :
               (A1 == 1 && A2 == 1 && B1 == 1 && C1 == 1 && D1 == 1 && VGND == 1 && VNB == 1 && VPB == 1 && VPWR == 1) ? 1'b1 :
               1'bx;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input 					enable_1,
	input 					wea_1,
	input 			[15:0]	data_in_1,
	input 			[15:0]	address_1,
	input 					enable_2,
	input 					wea_2,
	input 			[15:0]	data_in_2,
	input 			[15:0]	address_2,

	output 	wire			enable,
	output 	wire 			wea,
	output 	wire 	[15:0]	data_in,
	output 	wire 	[15:0]	address
    );assign enable 	=  (enable_1 == 1'b1)?enable_1:(enable_2 == 1'b1)?enable_2:(1'b1 & 1'b0);
assign wea 		= (enable_1 == 1'b1)?wea_1:(enable_2 == 1'b1)?wea_2:1'b0;
assign data_in 	= (enable_1 == 1'b1)?data_in_1:(enable_2 == 1'b1)?data_in_2:16'h0000;
assign address 	= (enable_1 == 1'b1)?address_1:(enable_2 == 1'b1)?address_2:16'h0000;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input input1,
    input input2,
    input input3,
    input input4,
    output output1
);assign output1 =  (input1 | input2 | input3 | input4) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input S,
    output Z
);assign Z =  (S == (1'b1 | 1'b0)) ? A : B;

endmodule

module top_module(
                        input  [31:0] A,
                        input  [31:0] B,
                        input   select,
                        output [31:0] ArithOut);assign ArithOut =  (select == (1'b1 | 1'b0))? A : B;endmodule

module top_module(
    input [31:0] IR_D,
    input [1:0] A3_SEL,
    output [4:0] A3,
    input [31:0] RF_RT,
    input [31:0] imm_ext,
    input ALUB_SEL,
    output [31:0] ALUB,
    input [31:0] RDATA,
    input [31:0] RES_ALU_W,
    input [31:0] PC8_W,
    input [1:0] WD3_SEL,
    output [31:0] WD3,
    input [31:0] RES_ALU_E,
    input [31:0] HL_E,
    input AO_SEL_E,
    output [31:0] AO_E
    );wire[4:0] rt, rd;
    assign {rt, rd} = IR_D[20:11];
    
    assign A3 = (A3_SEL == 2'b00)? rt:
                (A3_SEL == 2'b01)? rd:
                (A3_SEL == 2'b10)? 5'h1f:
                                   rt;

    assign ALUB =  (ALUB_SEL == (1'b1 | 1'b0))? imm_ext : RF_RT;                                   

    assign WD3 = (WD3_SEL == 2'b00)? RES_ALU_W:
                 (WD3_SEL == 2'b01)? RDATA:
                 (WD3_SEL == 2'b10)? PC8_W:
                                     RES_ALU_W;   

    assign AO_E = AO_SEL_E? HL_E : RES_ALU_E;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input clk,            // Added clock input
  input read,
  input write,
  input [n-1:0] address,
  input [m-1:0] data_in,
  output [m-1:0] data_out
);parameter n = 8; // number of address lines
parameter m = 16; // number of data lines

reg [m-1:0] memory [2**n-1:0]; // memory array

assign data_out =  (read && !write) ? memory[address] : {m{(1'b1 & 1'b0)}}; // read operation, used concatenation for safety

always @ (posedge clk) begin
  if (write && !read) begin // write operation
    memory[address] <= data_in;
  end
end

endmodule

module top_module(
    output Y,
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input A3,
    input B1,
    input VPWR,  // Added direction declaration
    input VGND   // Added direction declaration
);assign Y =  ((A1 & A2 & A3) | (A1 & ~B1) | (~A1 & B1) | (~A1 & ~A2 & ~A3 & B1)) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module mux_4to1 (
  input [1:0] sel,
  input d0,
  input d1,
  input d2,
  input d3,
  output y);assign y =  (sel == 2'b00) ? d0 :
           (sel == 2'b01) ? d1 :
           (sel == 2'b10) ? d2 :
           (sel == 2'b11) ? d3 :
           (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input SEL,
    output OUT
);assign OUT =  (SEL == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? A : B;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input [1:0] shift,
    output [3:0] data_out
);assign data_out =  (shift == 2'b00) ? data_in :
                      (shift == 2'b01) ? {data_in[2:0], (1'b1 & 1'b0)} :
                      (shift == 2'b10) ? {1'b0, data_in[3:1]} :
                      {2'b00, data_in[3:2]};
                      
endmodule
module top_module(input sel,i0,i1,output f);assign f= (sel==(1'b1 & 1'b0))?i0:i1;endmodule

module top_module(
    input [15:0] A,
    input [15:0] B,
    input C,
    output [15:0] Q
);assign Q =  (C == (1'b1 | 1'b0)) ? A - B : A + B;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input C1,
    input D1,
    output Y
);// Combinational logic
    assign Y =  (A1 & A2) ? B1 : (A2 ? C1 : (A1 ? D1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0)));

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [1:0] S,
    output [3:0] Y
);assign Y =  (S == 2'b00) ? A :
               (S == 2'b01) ? {A[2:0], (1'b1 & 1'b0)} :
               (S == 2'b10) ? {1'b0, A[3:1]} :
                              A[1:0];

endmodule

module top_module(
  input A1,
  input A2,
  input B1,
  input B2,
  output X,
  input VPB,
  input VPWR,
  input VGND,
  input VNB
);wire sel;
  assign sel = A1 | A2;

  assign X =  sel ? (A1 ? B1 : B2) : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input S,
    output Y
);// Select between A and B based on S
    assign Y =  (S == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? A : B;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  B1  ,
    output X   ,
    
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);assign X =  (A1 || (A2 && !A1) || (B1 && !A1 && !A2)) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
	input  [32-1:0] data0_i,       
	input  [32-1:0] data1_i,
	input       	select_i,
	output [32-1:0] data_o
               );assign data_o =  (select_i == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? data0_i : data1_i;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input A3,
    input B1,
    output X
);assign X =  (A1 === 1'b1 && A2 === 1'b1 && A3 === 1'b1 && B1 === 1'b1) ? 1'b1 :
               (A1 === (1'b1 & 1'b0) && A2 === 1'b0 && A3 === 1'b0 && B1 === 1'b0) ? 1'b0 :
               1'bx;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input CS, 
    
    
    input A0,
    input A1,
    output [3:0] enable 
);assign enable =  CS == (1'b1 | 1'b0) ? 4'b0000 :
                {A1, A0} == 2'b00 ? 4'b0001 : 
                {A1, A0} == 2'b01 ? 4'b0010 : 
                {A1, A0} == 2'b10 ? 4'b0100 :
                {A1, A0} == 2'B11 ? 4'b1000 : 4'b0000;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input   [29:0]a0,
    input   [29:0]a1,
    input   choose,
    output  [29:0]out
    );assign out =  (choose==(1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? a0 : a1;
endmodule

module top_module(
  input               io_bus_cmd_valid,
  output              io_bus_cmd_ready,
  input      [2:0]    io_bus_cmd_payload_function_id,
  input      [31:0]   io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_0,
  input      [31:0]   io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_1,
  output              io_bus_rsp_valid,
  input               io_bus_rsp_ready,
  output              io_bus_rsp_payload_response_ok,
  output     [31:0]   io_bus_rsp_payload_outputs_0,
  input               clk
);assign io_bus_rsp_valid = io_bus_cmd_valid;
  assign io_bus_cmd_ready = io_bus_rsp_ready;
  assign io_bus_rsp_payload_response_ok =  (1'b1 | 1'b0);

  
  
  
  assign io_bus_rsp_payload_outputs_0 = io_bus_cmd_payload_function_id[0] ? 
                                           io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_1 :
                                           io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_0 ;


endmodule

module top_module(input [1:0] in, input sel, output out);assign out =  (sel == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? in[0] : in[1];
endmodule

module top_module(input [3:0] ha_sum, input [4:0] cla_bits, output [4:0] sum);assign sum =  {(1'b1 & 1'b0), ha_sum} ^ cla_bits;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input wire A_N,
    input wire B,
    input wire C,
    input wire VPWR,
    input wire VGND,
    input wire VPB,
    input wire VNB,
    output wire X
);assign X =  (A_N == 1'b1) && (B == 1'b1) && (C == 1'b1) ? 1'b1 :
               (A_N == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) || (B == 1'b0) || (C == 1'b0) ? 1'b0 :
               1'bx;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input        [3:0] A,
    input        [3:0] B,
    input              VPWR,
    input              VGND,
    input              VPB,
    input              VNB,
    output reg [3:0]   X
);wire [4:0] adder_result; // Result of addition
    assign adder_result =  {(1'b1 & 1'b0), A} + {1'b0, B};

    always @(*) begin
        X = adder_result[3:0] - 4'b0101; // Output the lower 4 bits minus 5
    end

endmodule

module top_module(
    input in0,
    input in1,
    input sel,
    output out
);assign out =  (sel == (1'b1 & 1'b0)) ? in0 : in1;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input in,
  input [1:0] sel,     // Select signal, adjusted to accommodate for n=4
  output [3:0] out     // Output size defined according to n=4
);// Define the number of outputs
parameter n = 4;

// Drive output signals based on the select signal
assign out =  (sel == 2'b00) ? {3'b000, in} :
             (sel == 2'b01) ? {2'b00, in, (1'b1 & 1'b0)} :
             (sel == 2'b10) ? {1'b0, in, 2'b00} :
             (sel == 2'b11) ? {in, 3'b000} : 4'b0000; // Default case (should be unreachable)

endmodule

module top_module(
    input input1,
    input input2,
    input input3,
    input input4,
    input input5,
    input input6,
    input input7,
    input input8,
    output output1
);wire sum;
    assign sum = input1 + input2 + input3 + input4 + input5 + input6 + input7 + input8;
    
    assign output1 =  (sum % 2 == 1) ? 1'b1 : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input in1,
    input in2,
    input en,
    output out
);assign out =  (en == 1'b1) ? (in1 & in2) : (1'b1 & 1'b0);

endmodule

module top_module(input [31:0] data_in, output [31:0] result);assign result =  {data_in[30:0], (1'b1 & 1'b0)};

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input [1:0] B1,
    input [1:0] B2,
    input C1,
    output Y
);assign Y =  (A1) ? 1'b1 : ((A2) ? (1'b1 & 1'b0) : ((B1 > B2) ? 1'b1 : ((B1 < B2) ? 1'b0 : ((C1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0))));

endmodule

module top_module(P);output P;

	assign P =  (1'b1 | 1'b0);endmodule

module custom_module (
    output X,
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1_N,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB
);

    assign X =  (A1 & A2) ? 1'b1 :
               (!B1_N) ? (1'b1 & 1'b0) :
               (VPWR & !VGND) ? 1'b1 :
               (VPB & !VNB) ? 1'b0 :
               1'b1;

endmodule

module three_to_one (
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1_N,
    output Y,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND
);

    assign Y =  (A1 && A2) ? 1'b1 :
               (A1 && !A2) ? (1'b1 & 1'b0) :
               (!A1 && A2) ? 1'b0 :
               (!A1 && !A2 && !B1_N) ? 1'b1 :
               (!A1 && !A2 && B1_N) ? 1'b0 :
               1'b0;

endmodule
